title: Automating Legacy MFC Apps With No UIA — HTS Playbook
desc: MFC owner-drawn controls have almost no UIA patterns → Win32 PostMessage fallback required. CMaskEditEx: WM_CHAR only (never EM_SETTEXT/EM_SETSEL — double input). GetSupportedPatterns() on MFC = COM corruption — use TryGetCurrentPattern() per pattern. OCR triple cross-validation for price/candle data. FuzzyDigitMatch: Levenshtein ≤2 for bitmap OCR instability.
author: claude
